nav.wordmarkWide: Get Camino: Your Road to Spain

home.headline: Your move to Spain, planned in one short interview.
home.sub: From the right visa to the right city, schools to paperwork — Lola figures out what applies to you, in the right order.
home.disclaimer: Free · Takes about 3 minutes · No account needed to start
home.sampleLink: Not sure yet? Watch it work below ↓ — or peek at a sample roadmap →
home.strip: Visas · Where to live · Schools · Banking · NIE · TIE · Empadronamiento · Modelo 720 · Driving · Remote work

demo.title: Watch a roadmap build itself.
demo.q1: When are you planning to arrive?
demo.q2: What passports does your household hold?
demo.b2: Decide where in Spain to live
demo.step1: Tell Lola your situation — a short interview, not a form.
demo.step2: Get your personal roadmap — every step that applies, in the right order.
demo.step3: Work through it together — it re-plans as life changes; a short weekly email keeps what's due in view.

proof.title: You leave with this.
proof.caption: This is Susan & Tom's — retirees heading for the non-lucrative visa. Yours will be yours.
proof.more: …{{count}} steps, dated, each official one citing its government source

trust.title: Why trust it
trust.b1: Every official step cites its government source — check everything yourself.
trust.b2: The app can't invent numbers or deadlines. Specifics live behind the sources.
trust.b3: Read how it was built — decisions and mistakes included.
trust.b4: Free, cookieless, and no account needed to start.

finalCta.title: Ready? Lola's first question is waiting.
finalCta.sample: or peek at the sample first

home.euHook: EU citizen? Your list is shorter — but never empty. Get Camino builds the right one for you.
home.engineLine: AI asks the questions. It never decides your deadlines — a deterministic engine does, from official sources.

cited.label: One real step from a roadmap

catch.title: The catch?
catch.body: There isn't one — but there are limits. Get Camino maps the route and cites every official source; it doesn't file your forms, and it can't judge a borderline personal case. For those, you'll still want a gestor or an immigration lawyer.
catch.free: Free, and you're not the product: no ads, no data sold, no account needed to start.

legal.englishNotice: Legal pages are provided in English; the English version prevails.

footer.note: Guidance only — not legal or tax advice.

storeBadges.titleLive: Get Get Camino on your phone.
storeBadges.titleSoon: The web app works today. The phone apps are coming.
storeBadges.subLive: Your full roadmap, on iPhone and Android.
storeBadges.subSoon: Everything runs right here in your browser — no install needed. Native iPhone and Android apps are in the works.

emailSignIn.sentSub: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Tap it on this device — or enter the one-time code from the same email:
emailSignIn.hint: No password — the link (or code) signs you in.
emailSignIn.errSend: Could not send the email — try again.
emailSignIn.errCode: That code didn’t match — check the email or send a fresh one.

signIn.title: Sign in to Get Camino
signIn.sub: Save your roadmap and pick it up on any device.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your account?
deleteAccount.warning: This permanently deletes your account, your answers, and your roadmap — immediately, with no undo and no recovery window. The free guides stay open to everyone.
deleteAccount.doneSub: Your account, answers, and roadmap are gone. If Spain calls again, we’ll be here — buen camino.
deleteAccount.err: That didn’t work — nothing was deleted. Try again, or reach us via Report a problem.

authConfirm.headline: Open your roadmap
authConfirm.sub: One tap and you're signed in on this device — we sent this link to your email, so it's yours alone.
authConfirm.expiredSub: No problem — enter your email and we’ll send a fresh code that signs you in right here.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.sub: Questions, ideas, something broken — we read everything, and reply when you leave an email.
contact.emailLabel: Your email (optional — so we can reply)
contact.thanksSub: We read every message. If you left an email, we'll get back to you.
contact.errSend: That didn’t go through — please try again.
